
## 🚌 RideEase - Bus Booking App

## 📌 Overview

RideEase is a simple bus booking web application developed using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
It allows users to register, log in, search for buses, book tickets, cancel bookings, and leave reviews.

---

## 🚀 Features

* 👤 User Registration and Login
* 🔐 Session-based Authentication
* 🏠 Home Page with App Information
* 🔍 Search Available Buses (From & To filtering)
* 🚌 View Bus Details (Type, Time, Fare, AC/Non-AC, Rating, Reviews)
* 🎟 Book Bus Tickets
* 💳 Payment Validation (UPI/Card)
* 📄 Auto-generated Ticket with Details
* ❌ Cancel Ticket with Refund Option
* ⭐ Submit Reviews (only after travel)
* 📋 My Bookings Page
  * View all booked tickets
  * Cancel tickets
  * Write reviews directly
* 🔄 Auto-fill Bus Details while Booking
* 🚪 Logout Functionality

---

## 🛠 Technologies Used

* HTML
* CSS (Flexbox & Grid)
* JavaScript (DOM Manipulation)
* Web Storage (localStorage & sessionStorage)

---

## 💡 Key Concepts Used

* DOM Manipulation
* Event Handling
* Form Validation
* Local Storage for Data Persistence
* Session Storage for Authentication
* Dynamic UI Updates

---

## 📂 Project Structure

* HTML Files → Pages (Home, Login, Booking, etc.)
* CSS Files → Styling
* JS Files → Logic and Functionality

---

## 🎯 Conclusion

This project demonstrates a basic real-world bus booking system with user interaction, data storage, and dynamic functionality using frontend technologies.

---

## 🙌 Future Enhancements

* Backend integration (Node.js / Database)
* Live bus tracking
* Online payment gateway
* Responsive mobile design
* Admin panel for bus management
